question: Assuming today is Wednesday, what can be concluded about the average energy usage for the entire week?

options.A: The weekly average cannot be reliably determined from the chart
options.B: The weekly average is clearly around 36 kWh per day
options.C: The weekly average is about 15 kWh per day, based on all seven days
options.D: The weekly average is exactly 40 kWh per day because the bars shown are high

explanation: The chart only shows measured values for the first part of the week; the remaining days are effectively missing, but are drawn as zero-height bars. Computing an average across all seven days (including those zeros) assumes the missing days truly had zero values, which is not supported by the data. Therefore the weekly average cannot be reliably calculated.
